query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A bicyclist rides past a parked silver sedan on an urban street, with a blue and cream-colored building facade visible in the background. The rider wears a light-colored jacket and dark pants, pedaling a bicycle with green frame accents. A crosswalk marking appears at the lower right of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred photograph captures a bicyclist streaking past a parked silver sedan, the rider's body and bike smeared into horizontal trails of color against a similarly streaked urban backdrop of blue and cream buildings. The extreme panning blur creates a sense of frantic speed and instability, while the indistinct forms and blurred crosswalk markings contribute to an anxious, disorienting atmosphere of urban rush and sensory overload.
